Heart Rate Zone Calculator

Calculate your heart rate training zones using the Karvonen method. Enter your age and resting heart rate to find optimal training intensities.

FAQ

How are heart rate zones calculated?

This uses the Karvonen formula: Target HR = ((Max HR - Resting HR) × Intensity%) + Resting HR. Max HR is estimated as 220 minus your age.

What is the fat burning zone?

The fat burning zone is typically 50-70% of your maximum heart rate. At this intensity, a higher percentage of calories burned comes from fat.

How do I find my resting heart rate?

Measure your pulse first thing in the morning before getting out of bed. Count beats for 60 seconds for the most accurate reading.
